title: The Cat And Venus
content:
"Might his Cat be a woman," he said:
    Venus changed her: the couple were wed:
    But a mouse in her sight
    Metamorphosed her quite,
    And for bride, a cat found he instead.

    Nature Will Out
meaning:
"The Cat And Venus" is a quintessential example of Walter Crane's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
